    At FX4 we pride ourselves on offering fully transparent and quality execution, alongside some of the best trading solutions in the industry. We understand that different clients have different needs we take pride in offering the best service possible with Fusion.

    Click tab and create an account!

    Fusion are one of the world’s lowest cost brokers with over 250 instruments available to trade from Gold to Indices. Our tight spreads and $2.25 commissions per lot allow our traders to pay on average 36%* less compared to the competition.

    At FX4 Access over 10,000 tradable CFD products on the world’s biggest exchanges. Choose from our powerful trading platform options including MT4, MT5 this is provided by our business partner Fusion Markets a leading Australian Broker

    Who We Are

    FX4 Labs work with various pro organizations to provide our clients with educational tools Forex accounts to trade assets on the open market. We take pride in reducing these costs and passing the savings on to our members.

    Our Vision

    We do what is right for our customers, partners, employees, and all other stakeholders. Our people thrive in changing industry trends, business conditions, and demands by customers. Past experiences and newly acquired skills provide the confidence to forge ahead in an industry that keeps evolving.

    Our Mission

    We start with a focus on customers where specialised expertise, attention to detail, and follow through are seen as important aspects to all of our interactions. We work with various partners to achive this, we are determined to allow skilled traders the tools they require to suceed.

    EA AutoBot Trading

    “We do not actively promote or sell this robot; however, both loyal clients and new users are welcome to make a purchase.”

    FX4 Auto Bot

    “Unleash the Trader” EA Autobot’s 24/7 Market Moves with Emotionless Precision! Gians near 100% per month

    Philosophy

    “Efficiency Through Harmony: The Philosophical Core of Our Forex EA Autobot Trading”

    “Traders face a myriad of challenges, but three predominant reasons contribute to the staggering 94% failure rate: inadequate risk management, emotional decision-making, and a lack of comprehensive strategy.”

    For pricing please email support line below

    Click to Email

    Precision in Execution:

    Our Forex EA Autobot ensures precise execution of trades, leveraging advanced algorithms to make split-second decisions. By eliminating human errors and emotional biases, it consistently enters and exits positions at optimal points.

    24/7 Market Vigilance:

    Operating tirelessly 24 hours a day, five days a week, our Autobot never sleeps. This continuous market vigilance allows it to capitalize on global market opportunities and respond swiftly to changes, ensuring that trading decisions are made in real-time to align with dynamic market conditions.

    Disciplined Risk Management:

    One of the key benefits of our Autobot is its unwavering commitment to disciplined risk management. By adhering strictly to pre-defined risk parameters, it safeguards your investment against excessive losses, promoting a balanced and sustainable approach to trading that enhances long-term succes

    RISK WARNING! Please be aware that the performance of financial operations or activities via the trading platform bears an inherent risk. You can sustain a loss of some or all of your investment. Therefore, it is advised that trading shall be performed only after the risks, the associated expenses, the investment objectives, and your experience, have all been assessed. If necessary, you should seek professional advice. Established relationships online, in particular via social networks, shall be treated with caution. FX4 LABS is a trading platform development education company. The company does not provide financial, investment advise. FX4 LABS is not involved and/or does not interfere in any way in any trading operations. FX4 LABS is not responsible, nor will be held responsible, for your investment decisions. FX LABS trading partner is Fusion Markets from Australia who are a global trusted and regulated finacial broker, therefore trading and account management is handle by Fusion. Technical/legal question please convey at support@fx4labs.com
